'''''Walker''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] under the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. She was to deliver [[Habassa]] slaves to the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Mayhem]]''.

However the Rebels had learned of the convoy and sent an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] and a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] to disable the ''Walker'' and then a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] [[Ranger (Delta-class)|''Ranger'']] to board and liberate the slaves, while the Y-wing held the ''Mayhem'' long enough for the operation to be successful.

The freighter was destroyed afterward.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
